records.title: Net interest margin trend
records.summary: Track NIM trend by product, region, and segment with monthly drift alerts.
records.metric_definition: Net interest income divided by average earning assets.
records.methodology_note: Use standardized segment mapping and exclude one-off accounting adjustments.

records.title: Fraud loss rate
records.summary: Measure fraud loss basis points across card and ACH rails.
records.metric_definition: Fraud losses / transaction value by payment rail.

records.title: Prioritize explainable risk controls
records.summary: Deploy models with transparent risk factors and clear override paths for frontline teams.

records.title: Optimize cost-to-serve by segment
records.summary: Benchmark branch, contact-center, and digital journeys by customer segment to reduce avoidable servicing cost.

records.title: Board-ready value narrative
records.summary: Tie every use case to P&L line items, regulatory exposure, and accountable business sponsors.

records.title: Risk-adjusted growth sequencing
records.summary: Sequence growth initiatives by risk appetite and stress scenarios before scaling automation.

records.title: Favor real-time transaction use cases for fraud and exposure monitoring
records.summary: Prioritize use cases that leverage streaming transaction data for fraud detection, AML alerting, and real-time credit exposure rather than batch-only overnight processing, as sub-second decisioning drives the largest risk-adjusted returns.

records.title: Build reusable customer 360 data products consumable across business lines
records.summary: Prefer use cases that produce shared customer data products — unified balances, risk profiles, interaction histories — consumable by retail, wealth, and commercial teams rather than line-of-business silos that duplicate effort.
